creator: jcfyecrayz@liamekaens.com
text:
Created attachment 253466
[patch] fix build if devel/uthash installed; use libfetch instead of libcurl

Refresh patch.

The following is still applicable and still addressed in patch for textproc/libucl and textproc/py-ucl:
- build against bundled uthash
- use libfetch instead of libcurl

Other changes were committed upstream or addressed in ports commits separately (e.g., unbreak SIGNATURES without mentioning this bug).

Confirmed with poudriere (with and without devel/uthash)
